parameters.name: dateStart
parameters.description: The start date to look up safetyIssues by.

parameters.description: The end date to look up safetyIssues by.

parameters.name: issueType
parameters.description: The specified issue type only: 'recall', 'investigation'.(defaults to recall)

200.description: Paginated list of SafetyIssues from within the specified date range.

parameters.name: keywords
parameters.description: The keyword[s] to search descriptions for (Only applicable to 'complaint' type). Natural language (words, spaces) is allowed.

parameters.name: allKeywords
parameters.description: match must have all keywords. true or false. defaults to true

parameters.name: productType
parameters.description: Valid inputs: [vehicle], [childSeat], [tireDetails], [equipment] without brackets. Choose which product type to limit the search to.

parameters.name: productYearStart
parameters.description: Find only products made in the specified year or later

parameters.name: productYearEnd
parameters.description: Find only products made in the specified year or before

parameters.name: productMake
parameters.description: Restrict query to the specified make only

parameters.name: productModel
parameters.description: Restrict query to the specified model only

parameters.name: issueType
parameters.description: Valid inputs: [recall], [manufacturerCommunication], [complaint], [investigation] without brackets. Choose which issue type to limit the search to.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset of the records listing (for pagination).

200.description: A list of issues containing the key word[s] in their descriptions.

parameters.name: nhtsaId
parameters.description: The nhtsa id to search for.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter the response by the specified field. Valid inputs: [issueType]

parameters.name: filterValue
parameters.description: The value to use as a filter. Valid inputs: [recalls,complaints,investigations,manufacturerCommunications]

200.description: List of SafetyIssues identified by the specified nhtsaId.
